raw_items.title: Amazon Leo passes 300 satellites with Atlas and Ariane launches
raw_items.summary:
A pair of launches this week pushed the number of Amazon Leo satellites deployed to more than 300, but the company is still far short of a looming FCC milestone.

raw_items.title: DARPA selects three companies for lunar orbiter studies
raw_items.summary:
The Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency has awarded contracts to three companies to study concepts for a lunar mission to search for water ice in very low orbits.

raw_items.title: Trump sons invested in US group developing $1.1B tungsten project in Kazakhstan: FT
raw_items.summary: According to Financial Times, both Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump have been using a shell company to buy stakes in a US construction group called Skyline Builders.

raw_items.title: Arizona Metals tanks on rare negative-value PEA for Kay copper-zinc mine
raw_items.summary: The PEA gives Kay a post-tax NPV (at a 5% discount) of -$6 million and an internal rate of return of 4.9%.

raw_items.title: Colombia cartel ties taint Canadian Mint gold
raw_items.summary: An unidentified Texas supplier mixed Colombian gold with US gold before delivering it to the Mint, the New York Times reported.

raw_items.title: Canada positioned for $200B clean energy boom, but faster approvals needed: report
raw_items.summary: CanREA projects demand for electricity to rise, driven by industrial electrification, data centre growth, population increases, and the expansion of energy-intensive sectors.
